name: Aeon Acquisition I Corp.
business: Aeon Acquisition I Corp. is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a Business Combination with one or more businesses or entities. As of the date of this Report, it has not selected any specific Business Combination target and has generated no operating revenues to date.

catalysts.sentence: If the potential initial public offering is not closed by May 25, 2026 (subject to extension by mutual agreement), the Settlement Agreement will not become effective and the arbitration and related proceedings could continue, and we could remain subject to claims in excess of $15,000,000.
